description_long: This is a mobile whiteboard with a rectangular writing surface framed by a sturdy, dark-colored metal structure. The frame is supported by two vertical legs, each ending in a set of wheels for easy movement. The writing surface appears to be made of a smooth, glossy material suitable for dry-erase markers. The frame includes visible adjustment knobs on the sides, likely for tilting or locking the board in place. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, with a focus on functionality and mobility. No additional accessories such as marker trays or eraser holders are attached.
description: A mobile, rectangular whiteboard with a dark metal frame and wheels, featuring a smooth, glossy writing surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular writing surface and the supporting frame with wheels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the board and the adjustment knob on the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the writing surface and the supporting frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and adjustment mechanism.
